Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.diff

Interface DiffWriter

All Known Implementing Classes:
TextOnly, Writer16Colors, Writer16MillionColors, Writer256Colors, Writer8Colors
public interface DiffWriter
Generates the String representation of a diff between actual and expected values.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    flush()
    Flushes the writer's output.
    Queue<String>
    getActualLines()
     
    Queue<String>
    getDiffLines()
     
    Queue<Boolean>
    getEqualLines()
     
    Queue<String>
    getExpectedLines()
     
    String
    getPaddingMarker()
     
    void
    writeDeleted(String text)
    Deletes text that is present in actual but not expected.
    void
    writeEqual(String text)
    Adds text that is equal in expected and actual.
    void
    writeInserted(String text)
    Adds text that is present in expected but not actual.

  • Method Details

    • writeEqual

      void writeEqual(String text)
      Adds text that is equal in expected and actual.
      Parameters:
      text - the text to keep in actual
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the writer was already flushed

    • writeDeleted

      void writeDeleted(String text)
      Deletes text that is present in actual but not expected.
      Parameters:
      text - the text that needs to be deleted from actual
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the writer was already flushed

    • writeInserted

      void writeInserted(String text)
      Adds text that is present in expected but not actual.
      Parameters:
      text - the text that needs to be inserted into actual
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the writer was already flushed

    • getActualLines

      Queue<String> getActualLines()
      Returns:
      the lines of the actual value
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the writer was already flushed

    • getDiffLines

      Queue<String> getDiffLines()
      Returns:
      the lines to display after "actual" and before "expected" (empty lines should not be displayed)
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the writer was already flushed

    • getExpectedLines

      Queue<String> getExpectedLines()
      Returns:
      the lines of the expected value
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the writer was already flushed

    • getEqualLines

      Queue<Boolean> getEqualLines()
      Returns:
      a list which indicates whether the actual and expected values are equal on each line
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the writer was already flushed

    • getPaddingMarker

      String getPaddingMarker()
      Returns:
      a padding character used to align values vertically

    • flush

      void flush()
      Flushes the writer's output.
